channel.title: Projects on Hans Website
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hans Website
channel.copyright: 期許自己能在資料科學的路上走得更遠

item.title: BGG 桌遊地圖
item.description: 透過抓取 BoardGameGeek 桌遊網站的遊戲資料後，將不同桌遊彼此之間距離進行可解釋的資料視覺化

item.title: PREDICTION OF BLUEBERRY YIELD
item.description: Blueberries are often hailed as a superfood due to their rich nutritional content, thus garnering high interest in their health benefits and culinary versatility. Among the various types of blueberries, wild blueberries stand out for their high content of vitamins, manganese, anthocyanins, carotenoids, potassium, zinc, and antioxidants. Notably, wild blueberries have a significantly higher antioxidant content compared to cultivated blueberries, making them a highly sought-after commodity in the agricultural market.

item.title: MovieLens 100k 推薦系統
item.description: 運用電影評分資料資料嘗試構建基於不同方法的推薦系統
